headline: Elon Musk On Joe Rogan Show Says Tesla Will Definitely Make An Electric Van
summary: SpaceX and Tesla Inc (NASDAQ: TSLA) CEO Elon Musk appeared on Joe Rogan's podcast for the third time and with plenty to share.

headline: Tesla To Set Up Plant In Southern India State Of Karnataka: Reports
summary: Tesla Inc (NASDAQ: TSLA) will set up an electric car manufacturing unit in Karnataka, India, according to reports.

headline: Morgan Stanley's $150 Billion Investment Unit Thinking About Getting In On Bitcoin Action: Bloomberg
summary: Counterpoint Global, a $150 billion investment unit under Morgan Stanley (NYSE: MS), could be jumping into Bitcoin.

headline: Freewallet Defends Self-Hosted Wallets After Elon Musk Criticism, Says Installs Increased By 50%
summary: Freewallet, a “multi-cryptocurrency” wallet with over 3.5m users, said the Elon Musk incident “turned out to be staggering” for the company.

headline: Benzinga's Weekly Bulls And Bears: GameStop, Intel, Lyft, Tilray, Twitter And More
summary:
Benzinga has examined the prospects for many investor favorite stocks over the past week. 
	The week's bullish calls included a social media leader, a ride-sharing play and an unloved apparel stock.

headline: Stanford Researchers: Clubhouse's Raw Audio Data Vulnerable To Access By Chinese Govt.
summary: Clubhouse downloads rose quickly in China, where users are usually blocked from discussing sensitive subjects such as the government crackdown on Hong Kong's pro-democracy movement.

headline: Tesla to Set Up an Electric Car Manufacturing Unit in India's Karnataka
After 1,000% Rise In One Year, Is This Energy Drink Stock Still Worth Buying?
summary: Celsius Holdings Inc's (NASDAQ: CELH) stock has been on an impressive 1000%-plus run, but more upside could be ahead with a strong growth plan in place.

headline: Palantir's Q&A Platform For Investors Is Open All Weekend Ahead Of Q4 Earnings On Tuesday
summary: Big-data analytics company Palantir Technologies Inc (NYSE: PLTR) is scheduled to release fourth-quarter earnings Feb. 16, and the Denver-based company wants to hear from shareholders.

headline: Cathie Wood's ARK Invests Posts Fund Purchases For Friday, Feb. 12, 2021: RHHBY, LGVW, IRDM, NTDOY, NVS, FATE, TDY, KMTUY, ISRG, LMT
